personal_info.name: Maryam Fatima
personal_info.title: Full Stack Developer
personal_info.short_bio: Full Stack Developer with hands-on expertise in React, Python, Flask, and modern UI systems.
personal_info.full_bio: Maryam Fatima — Full Stack Developer with hands-on expertise in React, Python, Flask, and modern UI systems. Currently interning at Technify Software Solution, Hyderabad, crafting scalable web solutions and elegant interfaces.

experience.description: Developing full-stack applications using React, Flask, PostgreSQL. Optimized frontend performance by 22%, mentored interns, built REST APIs and component libraries. Direct collaboration with design and product teams.
Designed responsive websites for startups, integrated CMS & third-party APIs. Built reusable components with Tailwind, React. Enhanced cross-browser compatibility and accessibility.
Contributed to Python/JS open-source projects. Participated in 4+ hackathons, built prototype for ed-tech tool that won 'Best Innovation' at local hackathon.

projects.title: TaskFlow Manager
projects.description: Full-stack productivity suite with Kanban board, real-time sync, team analytics, and role-based dashboards.
projects.long_description: A comprehensive task management application that helps teams organize work efficiently. Features include drag-and-drop Kanban board, real-time updates, team analytics dashboard, user roles and permissions, task comments and attachments, due date tracking with notifications. Built with modern technologies to ensure smooth user experience and scalable architecture.

projects.title: Portfolio Analytics Hub
projects.description: Interactive dashboard for creative metrics, integrated with GitHub API and real-time chart visualizations.
projects.long_description: Analytics dashboard that tracks portfolio performance, GitHub activity, and visitor metrics. Features real-time charts, data export, custom date ranges, and interactive visualizations. Provides insights into user behavior and content performance.

projects.title: E-commerce UI Kit
projects.description: Fully responsive component library with dark mode, design tokens, and Storybook documentation.
projects.long_description: Production-ready component library for e-commerce applications. Includes 50+ components, dark mode support, design system documentation, accessibility compliant (WCAG 2.1), and performance optimized. Used by 3 production applications.

projects.title: GenAI Studio
projects.description: OpenAI powered copywriting assistant integrated with Flask backend and prompt engineering.
projects.long_description: AI-powered content generation tool that helps create marketing copy, blog posts, and social media content. Features multiple templates, custom prompt builder, content history, export options, and API integration. Built with Python Flask and OpenAI's GPT models.

contact_info.availability: Open for freelance and full-time opportunities

testimonials.name: Ahmed Raza
testimonials.text: Maryam is an exceptional developer who consistently delivers high-quality work. Her problem-solving skills and attention to detail are outstanding.

testimonials.name: Sana Khan
testimonials.text: Working with Maryam was a pleasure. She understands design requirements perfectly and implements them with clean, maintainable code.
